debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
`v₀ = ω tan(ωt) x₀` ⇒ `tan(ωt) = v₀ / (ω x₀)` ⇒ `sin(ωt)/cos(ωt) = v₀/(ω x₀)` ⇒ `sin(ωt) = (v₀ / (ω x₀)) cos(ωt)`.

Substituting into `cos(ωt) v₀ = ω sin(ωt) x₀`:  
`cos(ωt) v₀ = ω x₀ (v₀ / (ω x₀)) cos(ωt)` → `cos(ωt) v₀ = cos(ωt) v₀`, which holds.

This suggests that it is better to work with the relation `cos(ωt) v₀ = ω sin(ωt) x₀`.

Now, we can also compute `x(t)`:  
`x(t) = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin(ωt)/ω) v₀ = cos(ωt) x₀ + (cos(ωt)/ω) (v₀ / (ω x₀)) v₀`  
Wait no, better:

`x(t) = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin(ωt)/ω) v₀`, and from `cos(ωt) v₀ = ω sin(ωt) x₀`, we get `(sin(ωt)/ω) v₀ = cos(ωt) x₀`.  

Thus:  
`x(t) = cos(ωt) x₀ + cos(ωt) x₀ = 2 cos(ωt) x₀`.

Hmm, no. 

Actually, let's carefully derive the relation:  
`(sin(ωt)/ω) v₀ = (sin(ωt)/ω) v₀`, and from `ω sin(ωt) x₀ = cos(ωt) v₀`, we have `(sin(ωt)/ω) v₀ = x₀ (sin²(ωt)) / cos(ωt)`. 

This doesn't immediately help. 

Alternative approach: use that `v₀ = ω (sin(ωt)/cos(ωt)) x₀` when `cos(ωt) ≠ 0`. Then:  
`x(t) = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin(ωt)/ω) v₀ = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin(ωt)/ω) ω (sin(ωt)/cos(ωt)) x₀ = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin²(ωt)/cos(ωt)) x₀`.  
`x(t) = x₀ (cos(ωt) + tan(ωt) sin(ωt))`.  

But `tan(ωt) = v₀ / (ω x₀)` and `cos(ωt) + tan(ωt) sin(ωt) = cos(ωt) + (v₀ / (ω x₀)) sin(ωt)`. 

But we also have that `cos(ωt) v₀ = ω sin(ωt) x₀`, which gives `(v₀ / (ω x₀)) = (sin(ωt)/cos(ωt))`.

But this is going in circles. 

Alternatively, perhaps a better approach is to square `x(t)`:

`x(t) = cos(ωt) x₀ + (sin(ωt)/ω) v₀`.  
`x(t)² = cos²(ωt) x₀² + 2 (sin(ωt)/ω) cos(ωt) x₀ v

have h1 : S.ω ≠ 0 := by exact ω_neq_zero S
  have h2 : S.m > 0 := by exact S.m_pos
  have h3 : ∀ t : Time, ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
    intro t
    have h4 : ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [trajectory]
    rw [h4]
    have h5 : ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
      have h6 : ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + 2 * (⟨cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀, (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀⟩ : ℝ) := by
        calc
          ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 = ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := rfl
          _ = (‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ : ℝ) ^ 2 := by simp [Real.norm_eq_abs]
          _ = (‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_add_eq]
            <;> simp [inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, h1, hx, h2]
            <;> field_simp [h1]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> norm_num
            <;> simp_all [h1, h2]
            <;> linarith
          _ = ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + 2 * (⟨cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀, (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀⟩ : ℝ) := by
            calc
              (‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ : ℝ) ^ 2 =
                  ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + 2 * (‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ * ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ : ℝ) := by
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [sq]
                <;> nlinarith
              _ = ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + 2 * (⟨cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀, (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀⟩ : ℝ) := by
                have h7 : ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ * ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ = ⟨cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀, (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀⟩ := by
                  rw [← inner_eq_norm_mul_norm_of_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)]
                  <;>
                  simp [inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, h1, hx, h2]
                  <;>
                  field_simp [h1]
                  <;>
                  ring_nf
                  <;>
                  simp_all [h1, h2]
                  <;>
                  linarith
                linarith
      have h8 : ⟨cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀, (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀⟩ = 0 := by
        simp [inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, h1, hx, h2]
        <;> field_simp [h1]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [h1, h2]
        <;> nlinarith [cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
      linarith
    have h9 : ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 = (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 by positivity)]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [h1, h2]
      <;>
      nlinarith [cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
    have h10 : ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 = (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 by positivity)]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [h1, h2]
      <;>
      nlinarith [cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
    have h11 : (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have h12 : (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        rw [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
      have h13 : (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 = (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
        ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [h1]
        <;> ring_nf
      have h14 : (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 =
          (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
        rw [h13]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h14]
      have h15 : (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 =
          (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h15]
      have h16 : (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 =
          ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 := by rfl
      rw [h16]
      have h17 : ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 =
          ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (1 - (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2) := by
        have h18 : (sin (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 = 1 - (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
        rw [h18]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h17]
      have h19 : ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 * (1 - (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2) =
          (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 - (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
        ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [h1]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> nlinarith
      rw [h19]
      have h20 : (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 - (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) * (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
      rw [h20]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [h1, h2]
      <;>
      nlinarith [cos_sq_add_sin_sq (S.ω * t.val)]
    calc
      ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀ + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖cos (S.ω * t.val) • IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖(sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) • IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by

      _ = (cos (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (sin (S.ω * t.val)/S.ω) ^ 2 * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h9, h10]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [h1, h2]
        <;>
        nlinarith

  have h₂ : ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ = √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by sorry

have h1 : ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 ↔ ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by rfl
  have h2 : ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ = √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) → ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by
    intro h
    have h3 : S.ω ≠ 0 := by exact ω_neq_zero S
    have h4 : ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by
      -- Use the fact that the derivative of the trajectory is zero at t to show that the velocity is zero
      have h5 : ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 := by
        -- Use the given condition to show that the velocity is zero
        simp_all [trajectory_velocity, Trajectory, InitialConditions, HarmonicOscillator]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try field_simp at *) <;>
        (try simp_all [Real.sin_eq_zero_iff, Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]) <;>
        (try norm_num at *) <;>
        (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            nlinarith [Real.sin_le_one (S.ω * t.val), Real.cos_le_one (S.ω * t.val)]
          })
      exact h5
    exact h4
  have h3 : ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 → ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ = √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
    intro h
    have h4 : S.ω ≠ 0 := by exact ω_neq_zero S
    have h5 : ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ = √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
      -- Use the given condition to show that the norm of the trajectory is the square root of the sum of squares
      simp_all [trajectory_eq, Trajectory, InitialConditions, HarmonicOscillator]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try field_simp at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [Real.sin_eq_zero_iff, Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]) <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq]
          <;>
          ring_nf at *
          <;>
          nlinarith [Real.sin_le_one (S.ω * t.val), Real.cos_le_one (S.ω * t.val)]
        })
    exact h5
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact h3 h
  · intro h
    exact h2 h
